Happy Songkran days!! 💦🔫 If you don't know what Songkran is, well it's a Thailand festival that have water gun fight all over the country in the hottest summer time (April). Yeah it's summer for me and DAMN, the temperature is like 40°c / 104°F here! It's too hot, that I have to "migrate" to Japan lol. Right now I'm on a Japan trip, so you won't really see me being active. This bot I'm releasing recently is scheduled, while I'm traveling irl. I'll be right back after my Japan trip! (⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)

[Update Log: Improved the characters' personality, so that they feel more human now.]
